caption:
People keep saying private internet has to be slow.

That used to be true for me too, until random Wi-Fi and constant buffering got unbearable.
So I tried Freedom DNS with one tap.

Now pages load fast, streaming feels smooth, and public networks don’t feel risky every second.
No complicated setup, no tech headache.

If you live on public Wi-Fi, this one change is wild.

#privacy #dns #internetspeed #mobiletools #cyberhygiene
title: Freedom DNS - Myth Busting
